_meta.purpose: Provenance record for every bundled third-party asset (fonts, audio, dhikr content). Required by the release checklist before any store submission. See docs/store/release-checklist.md §B.
ownerActions: Fill dhikr-signoff: obtain a named scholar/editor sign-off for the Arabic text, tashkil, transliteration, and source references. Record the signer name, date, and scope in dhikr-signoff.md.
Fill audio entries when break-audio clips are commissioned or sourced — add source_url, license, license_url, author, and required_attribution for each clip.
Confirm font download dates and OFL license snapshot paths are current.

assets.name: Amiri Regular
assets.author: Khaled Hosny
assets.required_attribution: Amiri font by Khaled Hosny, licensed under SIL OFL 1.1.
assets.download_date: [[FILL — date fonts were added to the project]]
assets.notes: Primary Arabic typeface for the dhikr break overlay and all Arabic UI text.

assets.name: Amiri Bold
assets.author: Khaled Hosny
assets.required_attribution: Amiri font by Khaled Hosny, licensed under SIL OFL 1.1.
assets.notes: Bold weight used for headings and emphasis in Arabic text.

assets.name: Inter Variable
assets.author: Rasmus Andersson
assets.required_attribution: Inter font by Rasmus Andersson, licensed under SIL OFL 1.1.
assets.notes: Primary Latin/numeral typeface for English UI, numerals, and timers.

assets.name: Dhikr content bundle (9 adhkar)
assets.author: Compiled by Tarf team from Hisn al-Muslim and Sahih hadith collections
assets.required_attribution: Dhikr texts sourced from authenticated hadith collections (Sahih al-Bukhari, Sahih Muslim, Hisn al-Muslim). References included in each entry.
assets.signoff_status: PENDING — owner must obtain and record the dhikr sign-off before release
assets.notes: 9 universally-agreed, non-sectarian adhkar with full tashkil (diacritics), transliteration, English translation, and hadith references. Arabic text is immutable. Scholarly sign-off is a BLOCKING gate per the release checklist.

assets.name: Break start chime
assets.author: [[FILL — commissioned reciter or CC0 source]]
assets.required_attribution: [[FILL — if CC0/Pixabay: attribution optional but recommended; if commissioned: per agreement]]
assets.notes: Gentle chime played at the start of the 20-second break. Must be CC0, Pixabay license, or commissioned with written agreement stored at assets_ledger/audio-agreements/.

assets.name: Break end chime
assets.author: [[FILL]]
assets.notes: Gentle chime played at the end of the 20-second break (break-complete cue).

assets.file: [[app/assets/audio/dhikr_*.mp3 — ADD FOR EACH DHIKR ENTRY WHEN SOURCED]]
assets.name: Dhikr audio clips (one per entry)
assets.author: [[FILL — commissioned reciter]]
assets.notes: One audio clip per dhikr entry in dhikr.json. If commissioned, the signed agreement must be stored at assets_ledger/audio-agreements/<id>.pdf. Arabic TTS fallback (flutter_tts gated on isLanguageInstalled('ar-SA')) may be used as an interim substitute.

thirdPartyLibraries.note: Dart/Flutter package licenses are enumerated at runtime via the LicenseRegistry and rendered in the in-app Licenses screen. The packages below are the key ones users are most likely to ask about.
